creator: will.brokenbourgh2877@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158459
Image depicting gtk prefixes

Menus, menu items, Preferences tabs and item labels are all prefixed with 'gtk'.

For example, the 'File' menu displays as 'gtkFile', the 'Edit' menu displays as 'gtkEdit' and so on.

Using FreeBSD 10.1 - 64-bit, fully updated packages using pkg-ng.

`locale` yields
LANG=
LC_CTYPE="C"
LC_COLLATE="C"
LC_TIME="C"
LC_NUMERIC="C"
LC_MONETARY="C"
LC_MESSAGES="C"
LC_ALL=

Please see attached image for more information
